untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of dual-head structure with specific volume profile across multiple bars (left shoulder > dual heads > right shoulder with declining volumes). This multi-bar morphological feature cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator comparisons. The 'dual heads' formation and their relative volume relationships require pattern recognition beyond available point-in-time indicators. Entry approximated using Donchian breakout + declining volume proxy, but the core dual-head structure validation is not possible.
